text: I've been meaning to tell you a good procrastination joke, but I'll get around to it eventually. Actually, here's one: Why did the procrastinator go to the bank? He wanted to see his balance, but decided to check it tomorrow instead. Or if you prefer something more relatable: Procrastination is like a credit card—it's a lot of fun until you get the bill. Except with procrastination, the bill is just everything you should have done three weeks ago finally coming due all at once.
